name: Homemade Mounds Bars (1)
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the milk and vanilla extract until combined.
2. Gradually add the powdered sugar, stirring continuously until smooth.
3. Stir in the coconut flakes.
4. Press the mixture firmly into a 9x13 inch pan.
5. Refrigerate until firm.
6. Cut into bars.
7. Melt the chocolate chips and dip each bar several times.
8. Allow to cool on waxed paper for several hours before serving.
